seoTitle: Auldana vs Avenue Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Auldana and Avenue Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Auldana vs Avenue Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Auldana and Avenue Range.
heading: Auldana vs Avenue Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Auldana, South Australia and Avenue Range, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Auldana has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Avenue Range (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Auldana or Avenue Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Auldana has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Avenue Range scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Auldana scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Avenue Range scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Auldana or Avenue Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Auldana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
